description: Model a parametric dual 18650 battery holder in SolveSpace with the following specifications: a 44x71x21 mm base block, a 40x67x19 mm internal pocket, and a 2x67x10 mm central separator rib. Save the project file to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/18650_holder.slvs and export the 3D triangle mesh to /home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/18650_holder.stl.
